scripts.predev: node scripts/apply-audience.mjs && node scripts/build-search-index.mjs && node scripts/gen-seo.mjs
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/apply-audience.mjs && node scripts/build-search-index.mjs && node scripts/gen-seo.mjs
scripts.dev:internal: node scripts/apply-audience.mjs --internal && node scripts/build-search-index.mjs && next dev
scripts.build:internal: node scripts/apply-audience.mjs --internal && node scripts/build-search-index.mjs && next build
